ddls:
CREATE TABLE "loans" (
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loan */,
  "loan_amount" REAL /* Amount borrowed by the applicant */,
  "funded_amount" REAL /* Amount funded by investors */,
  "term" TEXT /* Term of the loan (e.g., 36 months, 60 months) */,
  "interest_rate" REAL /* Interest rate of the loan */,
  "installment" REAL /* Monthly installment amount */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Credit grade of the applicant (e.g., A, B, C) */,
  "sub_grade" TEXT /* Sub-grade of the applicant (e.g., A1, A2, A3) */,
  "employment_length" TEXT /* Length of employment of the applicant */,
  "home_ownership" TEXT /* Home ownership status of the applicant */,
  "annual_income" REAL /* Annual income of the applicant */,
  "payment_history" TEXT /* Payment history of the borrower */,
  "loan_type" TEXT /* Type of loan (e.g., personal, business) */,
  "risk_score" REAL /* Calculated risk score for the loan */,
  "application_date" TEXT /* Date the loan application was submitted */,
  "disbursement_date" TEXT /* Date the loan was disbursed */,
  "collateral_type" TEXT /* Type of collateral if the loan is secured */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("loan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "credit_reports" (
  "credit_report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each credit report */,
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan associated with the credit report */,
  "dti" REAL /* Debt-to-income ratio of the applicant */,
  "earliest_credit_line" TEXT /* Date of the applicant's earliest credit line */,
  "inq_last_6mths" INTEGER /* Number of inquiries in the last 6 months */,
  "open_acc" INTEGER /* Number of open accounts */,
  "pub_rec" INTEGER /* Number of public records */,
  "revol_util" REAL /* Revolving utilization */,
  "credit_score" INTEGER /* Credit score of the applicant */,
  "bankruptcies" INTEGER /* Number of bankruptcies */,
  "tax_liens" INTEGER /* Number of tax liens */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the credit report was generated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("credit_report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_credit_reports_loan_id FOREIGN KEY ("loan_id") REFERENCES loans ("loan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loan_statuses" (
  "loan_status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loan status */,
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan associated with the status */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the loan (e.g., Fully Paid, Charged Off) */,
  "issue_date" TEXT /* Date the loan was issued */,
  "status_update_date" TEXT /* Date the status was last updated */,
  "default_date" TEXT /* Date the loan defaulted, if applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("loan_status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loan_statuses_loan_id FOREIGN KEY ("loan_id") REFERENCES loans ("loan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loan_purposes" (
  "loan_purpose_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loan purpose */,
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan associated with the purpose */,
  "purpose" TEXT /* Purpose of the loan (e.g., credit_card, car, small_business) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the loan purpose */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("loan_purpose_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loan_purposes_loan_id FOREIGN KEY ("loan_id") REFERENCES loans ("loan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., credit analyst, loan officer, risk manager) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
